cartas.descricao: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.
The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.
A ferocious dragon with a deadly attack.
A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts remarkable power.
A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.
A wicked dragon that taps into dark forces to execute a powerful attack.
An elf who learned to wield a sword, he baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

cartas.nome: Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #1
cartas.descricao: A mountain dragon with wings to create tornadoes.
Much more than a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.

Once per turn: You can toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, destroy all monsters your opponent controls. If you call it wrong, destroy all monsters you control, and if you do, you take damage equal to half the total ATK those destroyed monsters had on the field.
What this creature lacks in size, it makes up for in defense when defending its prairie home.
A white wolf and loyal companion that is sharp-fanged and quick on its feet.
A delicate elf that lacks offensive power, but has a superb defense backed by mystical power.
A giant warrior made of stone. A charge from this creature makes the earth shake.
A planar wanderer who has mastered both swordplay and sorcery.
A monster with tremendous power, it destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.
A one-eyed giant behemoth with thick arms that deliver powerful blows.
A deadly doll created by a rogue sorcerer that attacks with magical energy.
Fast on its feet, this dinosaur rips enemies to shreds with its sharp claws.
A powerful warrior from the underworld who uses a massive stone axe.
If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck to your hand.
If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand.
During damage calculation, if your opponent's monster attacks (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; you take no battle damage from that battle.
If you have Right Leg, Left Leg, Right Arm, and Left Arm of the Forbidden One in addition to this card in your hand, you win the Duel.

cartas.nome: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
cartas.descricao: A forbidden left arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

cartas.nome: Right Arm of the Forbidden One
cartas.descricao: A forbidden right arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

cartas.nome: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
cartas.descricao: A forbidden left leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

cartas.nome: Right Leg of the Forbidden One
cartas.descricao: A forbidden right leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with 'Contract with Exodia'.
Trap Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Trap effects on the field.
If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).
A new Elemental HERO has arrived from Neo-Space! When he initiates a Contact Fusion with a Neo-Spacian, his unknown powers are unleashed.
A winged Elemental HERO who wheels through the sky and manipulates the wind.
A flame manipulator who is the only woman among the Elemental HEROes. Her Burst Fire burns away villainy.
An Elemental HERO with a clay body built like a brick wall. He will protect his fellow HEROes at all costs.
An Elemental HERO and a weapon master who wields static electricity, sparking cosmic justice.
If this is the only card in your hand, you can Special Summon it (from your hand).

When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can activate 1 of these effects; Add 1 'HERO' monster from your Deck to your hand, or destroy Spells/Traps up to the number of other HERO monsters you control.
If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 'Change' Quick-Play Spell Card from your Deck to your hand.
During your Main Phase: You can return this face-up card from the field to the hand.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having exactly 3 DARK monsters in your GY.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having 4 or more 'Lightsworn' monsters with different names in your GY.
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 Fiend monster from your hand or Deck, but its effects are negated.
During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn.
When a card or effect is activated that includes any of these effects (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; negate that effect.

When a monster on the field activates its effect, or when a Spell/Trap that is already face-up on the field activates its effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; destroy that card on the field.
During either player's turn: You can send this card from your hand to the GY; this turn, each time your opponent Special Summons a monster(s), immediately draw 1 card.

During the Main Phase, if your opponent Normal or Special Summoned 5 or more monsters this turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute as many face-up monsters on the field as possible, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand.
When a card or effect is activated that would destroy a card(s) on the field (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.
When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can destroy all cards on the field.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by revealing 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' in your hand.
This card is treated as a Normal Monster while in the hand or GY.

cartas.nome: Maiden with Eyes of Blue V3
cartas.descricao: When a card or effect is activated that targets this card (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon 1 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' from your hand, Deck, or GY.

cartas.nome: Sage with Eyes of Blue V3
cartas.descricao: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 Level 1 LIGHT Tuner monster from your Deck to your hand, except 'Sage with Eyes of Blue'.

cartas.nome: The White Stone of Ancients V3
cartas.descricao: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there this turn: You can Special Summon 1 'Blue-Eyes' monster from your Deck.
Gains 300 ATK for every 'Dark Magician' or 'Magician of Black Chaos' in either GY.
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand that specifically lists the card 'Dark Magician' in its text.
You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 card.
When this card is Normal Summoned: Add 1 'Cyber' Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.
If this card is Special Summoned: You can make this card's Level become 5 until the end of this turn.
You can discard 1 other monster; Special Summon this card from your hand.
If you control a 'Blackwing' monster other than 'Blackwing - Gale the Whirlwind', you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).
If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

cartas.nome: Blackwing - Kalut the Moon Shadow V3
cartas.descricao: During damage calculation, if a 'Blackwing' monster you control battles (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY; that monster gains 1400 ATK until the end of this turn.
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 2 or lower monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Defense Position, but its effects are negated.
If this card is in your GY and you control a Tuner monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field.
During the Battle Phase of the turn this card was Normal Summoned, you can make its original ATK become double until the end of the Battle Phase.
If this card is Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone: You can Special Summon as many 'Crystal Beast' monsters as possible from your Spell & Trap Zone.
When this card is Normal, Flip, or Special Summoned: You can place 1 'Crystal Beast' monster from your hand, Deck, or GY face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having 7 'Crystal Beast' cards with different names on your field and/or GY.
Once per turn: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Level 4 or lower 'Lightsworn' monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

cartas.nome: Raiden, Hand of the Lightsworn V4
cartas.descricao: During your Main Phase: You can send the top 2 cards of your Deck to the GY, then if any 'Lightsworn' monsters were sent to the GY by this effect, this card gains 200 ATK until the end of your opponent's turn.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. If this card is sent from your Deck to the GY: Special Summon it.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by revealing 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' in your hand.
This card is treated as a Normal Monster while in the hand or GY.

cartas.descricao: When a card or effect is activated that targets this card (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon 1 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' from your hand, Deck, or GY.

cartas.nome: Sage with Eyes of Blue V10
cartas.descricao: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 Level 1 LIGHT Tuner monster from your Deck to your hand, except 'Sage with Eyes of Blue'.

cartas.nome: The White Stone of Ancients V10
cartas.descricao: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there this turn: You can Special Summon 1 'Blue-Eyes' monster from your Deck.
Gains 300 ATK for every 'Dark Magician' or 'Magician of Black Chaos' in either GY.
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand that specifically lists the card 'Dark Magician' in its text.
You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 card.
When this card is Normal Summoned: Add 1 'Cyber' Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand.
If this card is Special Summoned: You can make this card's Level become 5 until the end of this turn.
You can discard 1 other monster; Special Summon this card from your hand.
If you control a 'Blackwing' monster other than 'Blackwing - Gale the Whirlwind', you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).
If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

cartas.nome: Blackwing - Kalut the Moon Shadow V10
cartas.descricao: During damage calculation, if a 'Blackwing' monster you control battles (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY; that monster gains 1400 ATK until the end of this turn.
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 2 or lower monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Defense Position, but its effects are negated.
If this card is in your GY and you control a Tuner monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field.
During the Battle Phase of the turn this card was Normal Summoned, you can make its original ATK become double until the end of the Battle Phase.
If this card is Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone: You can Special Summon as many 'Crystal Beast' monsters as possible from your Spell & Trap Zone.
When this card is Normal, Flip, or Special Summoned: You can place 1 'Crystal Beast' monster from your hand, Deck, or GY face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having 7 'Crystal Beast' cards with different names on your field and/or GY.
Once per turn: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Level 4 or lower 'Lightsworn' monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

cartas.nome: Raiden, Hand of the Lightsworn V11
cartas.descricao: During your Main Phase: You can send the top 2 cards of your Deck to the GY, then if any 'Lightsworn' monsters were sent to the GY by this effect, this card gains 200 ATK until the end of your opponent's turn.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. If this card is sent from your Deck to the GY: Special Summon it.
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by revealing 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' in your hand.

When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Destroy all Attack Position monsters your opponent controls.
When a monster(s) is Summoned: Destroy all monsters on the field.

When a monster(s) would be Summoned, OR a Spell/Trap Card is activated: Pay half your LP; negate the Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

When a monster(s) would be Summoned, OR when a Spell Card, Trap Card, or monster effect is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s): Pay 2000 LP; negate the Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

Activate this card by targeting 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Attack Position.
Target 1 monster on the field; return that target to the hand.

During your opponent's turn: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls whose ATK is less than or equal to their LP; destroy that face-up monster, and if you do, take damage equal to its original ATK, then inflict damage to your opponent equal to the damage you took.
When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.
Negate all Spell effects on the field. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase, you must pay 700 LP or this card is destroyed.
Negate all other Trap effects on the field.

Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn, then, if this card was Set before activation and is on the field at resolution, for the rest of this turn all other Spell/Trap effects in this column are negated.

Declare 1 monster card type (Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Pendulum); for the rest of this turn, neither player can Special Summon monsters of the declared type, also negate the effects of all monsters of that type while they are on the field.
Target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but its effects are negated, then you can banish 1 monster from each player's field that have the same Type as each other.
Banish 1 Normal Trap from your Deck, except 'Trap Trick', and Set 1 card with the same name directly from your Deck.
When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Destroy all Attack Position monsters your opponent controls.
When a monster(s) is Summoned: Destroy all monsters on the field.
When your opponent Summons a monster(s) with 1500 or more ATK: Destroy that monster(s) with 1500 or more ATK, and if you do, banish it.
When a monster(s) would be Summoned, OR a Spell/Trap Card is activated: Pay half your LP; negate the Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

When a monster(s) would be Summoned, OR when a Spell Card, Trap Card, or monster effect is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s): Pay 2000 LP; negate the Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
When a monster(s) would be Special Summoned, OR a monster effect is activated: Pay 1500 LP; negate the Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
Activate this card by targeting 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Attack Position.
Target 1 monster on the field; return that target to the hand.

During your opponent's turn: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls whose ATK is less than or equal to their LP; destroy that face-up monster, and if you do, take damage equal to its original ATK, then inflict damage to your opponent equal to the damage you took.
When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.
Negate all Spell effects on the field. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase, you must pay 700 LP or this card is destroyed.
Negate all other Trap effects on the field.
Activate by paying 1000 LP. Negate the effects of all face-up monsters while they are face-up on the field.
Neither player can Special Summon monsters. If a card is sent from the Deck or the field to your GY: Destroy this card.
